title: Cryptantha rostellata
taxonomy: Cryptantha rostellata is classified within the plant family Boraginaceae. This family includes plants commonly known as borage or forget-me-nots. Within the family Boraginaceae, Cryptantha rostellata belongs to the genus Cryptantha, a group of plants native to the western regions of North America. The species is further classified into the subgenus Cryptantha, which includes annuals and perennials with similar characteristics. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and biological characteristics of Cryptantha rostellata.
